message:
feat(runtime): add VOI sampling to schedule trace and configurable diff bench

schedule_trace.rs:
- Add snapshot_sampling config option for VOI-based queue snapshots
- Add snapshot_change_threshold for defining violation sensitivity
- Integrate VoiSampler into ScheduleTrace for adaptive snapshot frequency
- Include VoiSummary in trace exports for post-hoc analysis
- Reduces overhead in high-frequency trace scenarios

diff.rs:
- Make benchmark iteration count configurable via FTUI_DIFF_BENCH_ITERS env var
- Default remains 50 iterations
- Allows longer runs for perf profiling without code changes

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
